crossRefs.label: Inspect the transfer gear tooth contact.

blocks.text: 2. Transfer L. side case, transfer drive gear, transfer driven gear Remove
Remove the transfer L. side case (A), knock pin (B) and oil pipe (C). Remove the O-ring (D). Remove the transfer drive gear (E). Remove the transfer driven gear (F).
3. Transfer L. side case bearing removal
Remove transfer L. side case bearing (A) using adjustable bearing remover 45-75, sliding hammer weight and bearing remover shaft.
4. Transfer R. side case bearing removal
Remove transfer R. side case bearing (A) using adjustable bearing remover 45-75, sliding hammer weight and bearing remover shaft.
5. Transfer R. Side case bearing mounting
Install the new bearing using the driver handle 15 x 135L and the bearing driver attachment 62 x 64. Press-fit the bearing securely until it butts up against the transfer R. side case.
6. Transfer L. Side case bearing mounting
Install the new bearing using the driver handle 15 x 135L and bearing driver attachment 78 x 80. Press-fit the bearing securely until it butts up against the transfer L. side case.
7. Transfer drive gear, transfer driven gear Installation
Inspect the transfer gear tooth contact. Install transfer driven gear (A). Install the transfer drive gear (B).

refs.label: Inspect the transfer gear tooth contact.

blocks.text: Apply sealant to the sealing surface of the transfer L. side case.

items: The sealant must be genuine Honda liquid packing 1216E.
Wipe off old sealant and remove dirt and oil from the sealing surface.
If the sealant is left for more than 4 minutes after application, do not assemble the product as it is. Re-apply the sealant.
Transfer fluid should be injected 30 minutes after assembly.

blocks.text: Install the knock pin (A) and new O-ring (B), and install the oil pipe (C). Install the transfer L. side case (D). Inspect the transfer overall starting torque. ​

refs.label: Inspect the transfer overall starting torque.
